prompt: A pirate ship adventure scene with this rubber duck as the captain
prompt_refined: Generate a new image depicting a pirate ship adventure scene. Use the tall ship from image 1 as the primary vessel, transformed into a pirate ship by replacing its existing flags with a prominent pirate flag (skull and crossbones). A small rubber duck, wearing a miniature pirate hat, is positioned heroically at the ship's helm, overlooking turbulent ocean waves. The scene should be dynamic, with dramatic lighting and a stormy or adventurous sky, presented in an artwork style.
objects: pirate ship (transformed from the tall ship in image 1)
Union Jack flag (should not be present)
St. George's Cross flag (should not be present)
miniature pirate hat (on the rubber duck)
ship's helm (with the rubber duck positioned there)
